title: rubus oreteus
intro: Rubus oreteus, also known as the New Zealand thimbleberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, native to New Zealand. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Rubus oreteus include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce the risk of chronic diseases. Rubus oreteus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to alleviate various health issues.
